title: Infrastructure Simplification: Postgres + Redis Only
purpose: Update local infrastructure to run only PostgreSQL and Redis. Remove Supabase stack assumptions from docker-compose, env vars, and documentation.
architectural_constraints: Docker compose only runs postgres and redis services
No local Supabase Auth, Storage, Studio, or Kong
DATABASE_URL points to local Postgres (not Supabase connection pooler)

deliverables.description: Updated env vars: DATABASE_URL, REDIS_URL, SUPABASE_URL (hosted)
Updated docs: hosted Supabase Auth, local Postgres/Redis

acceptance_criteria: docker-compose.dev.yml has only postgres and redis services
npm run infra:up starts in < 10 seconds
CI workflow uses the same postgres + redis services
All tests pass with local postgres (no auth.users stub needed after T2.1A)

failure_modes.scenario: Developer confusion about where auth lives
failure_modes.mitigation: Clear env var naming: SUPABASE_AUTH_URL vs DATABASE_URL
